creator: luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
text:
Updating the firbird25 server and client to the last version.
My poudriere build (i386 and amd64, FreeBSD 10.1, 10.2, 10.3 and 9.3) are fine.

While I'm here:

* adding cpe support
* adopting @preunexec instead of the deprecated @unexec in pkg-plist
* adoptin USES+= libedit
